info.name: Kisan Vaani - Sarvam APIs
info.description: Day-1 hands-on collection. Set the collection variable sarvam_api_key first (Collection > Variables). Run requests 1-4 in order. Request 5 (Twilio) is the optional bonus for Day 5.

item.name: 3 - Sarvam TTS (Kannada voice note)
item.description: Response contains audios[0] = base64 WAV text. Paste the whole response into tts_player.html to hear it.

item.name: 4 - Sarvam STT (transcribe your memo)
item.description: Click 'file' > Select Files > pick your recorded memo (wav or mp3, under 25 seconds). Response field: transcript. If the API rejects a field name, ask Claude to check docs.sarvam.ai and fix this request.

item.name: 5 - BONUS Twilio call (plays advisory to a friend)
item.description: Day-5 bonus only. friend_number must be a Verified Caller ID on your Twilio trial, India must be enabled in Voice Geo Permissions, and audio_url must be a public link to one generated WAV (upload it as a Twilio Asset).
